<?php namespace Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Casts; use Illuminate\Contracts\Database\Eloquent\Castable; use Illuminate\Contracts\Database\Eloquent\CastsAttributes; use Illuminate\Support\Uri; class AsUri implements Castable { /** * Get the caster class to use when casting from / to this cast target. * * @param array $arguments * @return \Illuminate\Contracts\Database\Eloquent\CastsAttributes<\Illuminate\Support\Uri, string|Uri> */ public static function castUsing(array $arguments) { return new class implements CastsAttributes { public function get($model, $key, $value, $attributes) { return isset($value) ? new Uri($value) : null; } public function set($model, $key, $value, $attributes) { return isset($value) ? (string) $value : null; } }; } }
